briefdescription.para: Personalization string length in words.
Personalization string length in bytes.
security strength in Bytes
Default seed life configuration.
Default DF (Derivation Function) length.
Default adaptive proportion test cutoff value.
Default repetition count test cutoff value.
Deterministic Random Number Generator mode.
Physical True Random Number Generator mode.
Hybrid Random Number Generator mode.
This typedef contains mode information on which TRNG operates.
Unhealthy state.
Healthy state.
Catastrophic state.
Error state.
Startup test state.
This typedef contains different states of TRNG.
Default state.
Instantiate state.
Reseed state.
Generate state.
This typedef contains trng driver state.
0x0 - Invalid argument
0x1 - Error when TRNG operation mode is invalid
0x2 - Error when DF length is invalid
0x3 - Error when seed life is invalid
0x4 - Error when seed is NULL
0x5 - Error when input seed length doesn't match with df length
0x6 - Error when TRNG state is invalid
0x7 - Invalid adaptive proptest cutoff value
0x8 - Invalid repitive count test cutoff value
0x9 - Error during memcpy of UserConfig structure
0xA - Error when device fails KAT or health tests
0xB - Error invalid buffer size
0xC - Error seed life expired and reseed required in DRBG mode
0xD - Invalid predication resistance valye
0xE - Error during memset
0xF - Timeout while waiting for done bit during reseed or generate
0x10 - CTF error during reseed
0x11 - DTF error during generate
0x12 - Error when resultant TRNG o/p doesn't match with expected o/p
0x13 - Error occurred while writing in to the register
0x14 - Error occurred when invalid blocking mode is selected
This function returns a reference to an XTrngpsx_Config structure based on the DeviceId.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xtrngpsx_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device being lookedup.

listitem.para: XTrngpsx_LookupConfig returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table (in xtrngpsx.c) corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.
Checks all the instances

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the TRNGPSV instance/driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the driver. Initialization includes only setting up the device id and base address. All the remaining parameters of the Instance will be initialized in Instantiate function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XTrngpsx instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the TRNGPSX driver.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM if invalid parameter passed to this function.
Validate input parameters.
Populate Config parameters

memberdef.argsstring: (XTrngpsx_Instance *InstancePtr, const u8 *Seed, u32 SeedLength, const u8 *PersStr, const XTrngpsx_UserConfig *UserCfg)
memberdef.name: XTrngpsx_Instantiate

briefdescription.para: This function instantiates the TRNG instance with user configure values.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the personalization string input

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful instantiation
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM If invalid parameter(s) passed to this function.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_SEED_VALUE If provide seed is NULL in DRBG mode
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_STATE If state is not in uninstantiate state
XTRNGPSX_UNHEALTHY_STATE If TRNG KAT fails
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_MODE If invalid mode is passed to this function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_DF_LENGTH If invalid DF input length is passed as a function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_SEED_LENGTH If provide seed length doesn't match with given DF length
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_SEED_LIFE If invalid seed life is provided
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_ADAPTPROPTEST_CUTOFF_VALUE If invalid cutoff value is provided
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_REPCOUNTTEST_CUTOFF_VALUE If invalid repetitive test cutoff value is provided
XTRNGPSX_USER_CFG_COPY_ERROR If error occurred during copy of XTrngpsx_UserConfig structure
XTRNGPSX_TIMEOUT_ERROR If timeout occurred waiting for done bit
XTRNGPSX_CATASTROPHIC_CTF_ERROR If CTF bit asserted in STATUS register.
XTRNGPSX_ERROR_WRITE On write failure
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_BLOCKING_MODE If invalid blocking mode is chosen
XST_FAILURE On unexpected failure
Validate input arguments
Secure copy user configuration to driver instance
Bring TRNG and PRNG unit core out of reset
Configure health monitoring and DIT for PTRNG/HRNG
Configure cutoff values
Configure default DIT value
Do reseed operation when mode is DRNG/HRNG
Mark TRNG as healthy and ready for operation
Set error state on failure (except catastrophic failures)

briefdescription.para: This function triggers and reseeds the DRBG module.

parameterdescription.para: Seed length in TRNG block size

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful reseed
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM If invalid parameter(s) passed to this function.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_SEED_VALUE If provide seed is NULL in DRBG/HRNG mode
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_MODE If invalid mode is passed to this function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_DF_LENGTH If invalid DF input length is passed as a function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_STATE If state is not sequenced correctly
XTRNGPSX_UNHEALTHY_STATE If TRNG is in failure state, needs an uninstantiation or KAT should be run if the error is catastrophic
XTRNGPSX_TIMEOUT_ERROR If timeout occurred waiting for done bit
XTRNGPSX_CATASTROPHIC_CTF_ERROR If CTF bit asserted in STATUS register.
XTRNGPSX_ERROR_WRITE On write failure
XST_FAILURE On unexpected failure
Validate input arguments.
Wait for reseed operation and check CTF flag
Execute reseed operation with temporal protection against fault attacks

briefdescription.para: This function generates and collects random data in to a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to buffer in which random data is stored.
Size of the buffer in which random data is stored.
is the flag that controls Generate level Prediction Resistance. When enabled, it mandates fresh seed for every Generate operation.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful generate of random number
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM If invalid parameter(s) passed to this function.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_STATE If state is not sequenced correctly
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_MODE If invalid mode is passed to this function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_BUF_SIZE If buffer is less that 256 bytes or NULL
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PREDRES_VALUE If invalid predication resistance value is passed to this function
XTRNGPSX_UNHEALTHY_STATE If TRNG is in failure state, needs an uninstantiation or KAT should be run if error is catastrophic
XTRNGPSX_RESEED_REQUIRED_ERROR If elapsed seed life exceeds the requested seed life in DRBG mode
XTRNGPSX_TIMEOUT_ERROR If timeout occurred waiting for QCNT to become 4.
XTRNGPSX_CATASTROPHIC_DTF_ERROR If DTF bit asserted in STATUS register.
XTRNGPSX_ERROR_WRITE On write failure
XST_FAILURE On unexpected failure
Validate input arguments.
Wait for reseed operation and check CTF flag
Store prediction resistance setting for hardware configuration during data collection
Enable ring oscillators for random seed source
Configure TRNG control: enable TRSS, EU mode for PTRNG operation
Trigger generate and collect random data
State machine update: transition to generate state indicating successful operation
Update seed life and handle HRNG automatic reseed logic
HRNG automatic reseed logic: maintain fresh entropy based on configured seed life
Auto reseed in HRNG mode
Automatic reseed with internal entropy: maintain cryptographic strength
Update error state on failure (preserve catastrophic state)

briefdescription.para: This function uninstantiates the TRNG instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if uninstantiation was successful.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM if invalid instance is passed to function
XTRNGPSX_ERROR_MEMSET_UNINSTANTIATE_ERROR if memset was not successful
XST_FAILURE On unexpected failure
Bring cores in to reset state
Disable ring oscillators as a random seed source
Retain the error state

briefdescription.para: This function runs DRBG self test i.e DRBG full cycle Instantiate+Reseed, Reseed and Generate.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On success
Error Code On failure

briefdescription.para: This function runs health tests.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On success
Error Code On failure

briefdescription.para: This function runs preoperational self tests and updates TRNG error state.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On success
Error Code On failure
Reset the TRNG state

briefdescription.para: This file contains trng definitions of VersalNet.
